race.comment: DARNUM STUMP (2) turned in a fair run last time from an unfavourable draw finishing fourth by 2.75 lengths (19.51). Has winning claims on his best figures. DEVON DAISIES (7) was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 3.5 lengths sixth (19.80) over 350m at this track. Should be thereabouts. INTERJECTION (4) is mixing form lately, finishing out of the placings last time at Warragul but was a Rank Limit - Maiden winner two back at Sale. Well placed here and can atone this time. ASTON MERRICK (3) must be included in calculations.
